title: achnatherum pekinense subsp. effusum
intro: Achnatherum pekinense subsp. effusum is a type of perennial grass native to China, also known as Chinese silver grass or China silver grass, belonging to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antifungal, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Achnatherum pekinense subsp. effusum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and relieve respiratory problems. The plant is used in herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and extracts, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
